items.name: Blueberrinni Octopusini
items.description:
🫐🐙 Blueberrinni Octopusini 🐙🫐

From the sparkling Blueberry Seas 🌊✨ comes Blueberrinni Octopusini — the sweetest, splashiest little legend to ever pop into Pop Box! 💙🎉

With shimmering blueberry-blue tentacles 🫐💫 and a bubbly personality that pops with energy 💥😆, this ocean cutie loves bouncing, spinning, and celebrating every big win! 🏆🎊 Rumor says each tentacle holds a tiny burst of lucky pop power… but only true Pop Box players can unlock it! 🎯🔥

Dripping in berry sparkle ✨🫧 and ocean magic 🌊🔮, Blueberrinni Octopusini isn’t just adorable — it’s a badge of honor for dedicated pop masters! 💙👑

🌟 LIMITED TIME
🎮 ONLY in Pop Box
🚫 Nowhere else

Catch it before it swims back to the deep blue! 🌊⏳🐙

items.name: Soviet Tan BVD Paratrooper Battle Vest
items.description:
The BVD stands for "Boevaya Vikladka Desantnika", one of the rarest Soviet vests produced and issued to the VDV to put on during a firefight.

It goes together with the following:

Vest:
https://www.roblox.com/catalog/70560645142206/Soviet-Tan-BVD-Paratrooper-Battle-Vest

Pouches:
https://www.roblox.com/catalog/89257381167645/Soviet-Tan-BVD-Paratrooper-Battle-Pouches

"Never forget those roads,
Can't forget those alarms
The lesson of courage, that this country gave us
We'll never forget you,
Always keeping you in our memories
Close, but alien, poor, but dear,
Afghanistan!"

Special thanks to comrade Kazachenko for modelling this.

items.name: [PBR] Monochrome Hannya, Japanese traditional mask
items.description:
✨✨PBR, SHINY HANNYA MASK VERSION

The ' Golden Hannya, Japanese traditional mask ': https://www.roblox.com/catalog/113952831023710

The ' White Hannya, Japanese traditional mask ': https://www.roblox.com/catalog/123285551927084

The ' Red Hannya, Japanese traditional mask ': https://www.roblox.com/catalog/117070094831598

Ghost:
https://www.roblox.com/catalog/91327912247318

Black:
https://www.roblox.com/catalog/102806127354707

この悪鬼の名前は貴女です • 日本の伝説にすんでいます。

The Hannya mask with its sharp fangs and straight horns is probably the best known of all Noh masks. 
That wooden, red mask is related to Japanese traditional folklore. The hannya is a mask that represents a female 「貴女  •（きじょ • kijo）」demon woman.
Those kind of 「鬼  •（おに  •  Oni）」always have been associated with their manifesting in evil, vengeful propensities. 

Made by wyssion
All rights reserved.

More from Aluvion UGC: https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Category=1&CreatorName=Aluvion+UGC&salesTypeFilter=1&SortType=3&IncludeNotForSale
